title: Makefile: don't install to tmpfiles.d on FreeBSD
body:
There is no equivalent equivalent on FreeBSD and this causes lint failures when packaging.

[NO NEW TESTS NEEDED]

Signed-off-by: Doug Rabson <dfr@rabson.org>

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
`         # Error: initializing source docker://quay.io/libpod/testimage:20221018: can't talk to a V1 container registry`

Test failures look registry-related, not due to this PR
